creator: seanwbruno@gmail.com
text:
According to the HP website, there is a known issue fixed in later
versions of the firmware for the E200i

ciss0: firmware 1.66

Version 1.84:
Fixed a potential unresponsive condition related to controller lockup
error code 0x83.

Not completely sure if this is your problem or not.

But, can you give it a try and report back?  I don't have access to this
hardware in my test lab.
